facilities.name: Miramar Landfill
facilities.hours: Check the official City of San Diego Miramar Landfill page for current gate hours and holiday schedules.
facilities.fees: Landfill fees vary by load size, weight, and material type. Review the current city rate schedule before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the city landfill page to confirm vehicle rules, payment methods, and any special-load limits before driving.

facilities.name: Miramar Recycling Center
facilities.hours: Check the official Miramar Recycling Center page for current hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Many common drop-off streams are resident-focused or low-cost, but fees and payouts vary by material. Confirm before arrival.
facilities.rules: Review the official city accepted-items list and sorting instructions before you drive.

facilities.name: Household Hazardous Waste Transfer Facility
facilities.hours: Check the City of San Diego environmental services page for current hazardous-waste drop-off hours and any appointment rules.
facilities.fees: Typically resident-focused for household quantities. Confirm current eligibility and limits before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside posted household program scope
facilities.rules: Use the official city guidance to confirm packaging rules, quantity limits, and current household hazardous waste eligibility before visiting.

facilities.name: Sycamore Landfill
facilities.hours: Check the operator and CalRecycle listing for current gate hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Fees vary by material type, vehicle, and weight. Confirm current pricing before arrival.
facilities.rules: Always confirm accepted loads, payment terms, and any special handling rules before driving.

facilities.name: SANCO Resource Recovery
facilities.hours: Check the operator page for current recycling and drop-off hours.
facilities.fees: Fees or payouts vary by material stream, contamination, and quantity.
facilities.rules: Confirm accepted streams, prep rules, and current public drop-off policy before visiting.
